{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing & Social Media Executive",
  "description": "Redikla Resources Company - Our client, a fashion-forward brand, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing &amp; Social Media Executive

Job Location: Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

This role is for someone who:


	Can run and optimise Meta (Instagram &amp; Facebook) campaigns
	Understands fashion audiences + social trends
	Thinks commercially (revenue, not just engagement)
	Knows how to balance paid ads + organic content
	*Can create or coordinate compelling social content &mdash; including short-form video, reels, stories, and static posts &mdash; that resonates with a young adult fashion audience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV + Portfolio to: rediklaresources@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	If you&rsquo;ve got results to show, we want to see them.
	For more enquiries, Whatsapp 08062279190.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-27",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Redikla Resources Company"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

}



Marketing & Social Media Executive Job at Redikla Resources Company




        
    

        
        Redikla Resources Company - Our client, a fashion-forward brand, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing & Social Media Executive

Job Location: Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

This role is for someone who:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Can run and optimise Meta (Instagram & Facebook) campaigns
	Understands fashion audiences + social trends
	Thinks commercially (revenue, not just engagement)
	Knows how to balance paid ads + organic content
	*Can create or coordinate compelling social content — including short-form video, reels, stories, and static posts — that resonates with a young adult fashion audience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV + Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	If you’ve got results to show, we want to see them.
	For more enquiries, Whatsapp 08062279190.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant / Administrator",
  "description": "Vine Concepts Enterprise is a professional consulting firm specializedin contract management and execution and human resources (HR) services. We partner with organizations to provide reliable, compliant, and people-focused solutions that support sustainable business growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position : Executive Assistant / Administrator

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion / Bag &amp; Accessories Brand

Job Summary


	We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant / Administrator to support the Founder and oversee the daily administrative operations of a growing bag brand in Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for coordinating schedules, managing administrative processes, supporting business operations, and ensuring smooth communication across the business.
	This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced creative environment, possesses strong problem-solving skills, and can effectively manage multiple priorities with professionalism and discretion.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support:


	Manage the Founder&rsquo;s calendar, appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements.
	Prepare reports, presentations, meeting minutes, and correspondence.
	Follow up on action points, deadlines, and ongoing business projects.
	Handle confidential information with a high level of professionalism and discretion.
	Serve as the primary point of contact between the executive office and internal/external stakeholders.


Administrative Duties:


	Coordinate daily office operations and administrative activities.
	Maintain organized records, filing systems, and business documentation.
	Manage office supplies, vendor relationships, and procurement processes.
	Handle incoming calls, emails, and inquiries professionally.
	Support the implementation of operational procedures and administrative systems.


Operations &amp; Business Coordination:


	Assist with inventory tracking, order coordination, and customer fulfillment processes.
	Liaise with production teams, suppliers, logistics partners, and vendors.
	Support customer service activities to ensure excellent client experience.
	Assist with planning events, pop-ups, exhibitions, and brand activations.
	Coordinate internal communication and ensure efficient workflow across teams.


Financial &amp; Reporting Support:


	Assist with expense tracking, invoices, and petty cash management.
	Prepare simple operational and administrative reports when required.
	Support budgeting and cost-monitoring activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Management, Mass Communication, or a related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of experience in an Executive Assistant, Administrative, or Operations role.
	Experience within the fashion, retail, lifestyle, or creative industry is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational, multitasking, and time-management skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, and digital collaboration tools.
	Ability to work independently and take initiative.
	High level of integrity, professionalism, and attention to detail.


Preferred Skills:


	Customer relationship management skills.
	Basic understanding of social media and digital business operations.
	Strong coordination and stakeholder management abilities.
	Ability to thrive under pressure and meet deadlines.


Core Competencies:


	Organization &amp; Planning
	Communication Skills
	Problem Solving
	Confidentiality &amp; Professionalism
	Attention to Detail
	Time Management
	Adaptability &amp; Initiative.


Salary
N100,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resumes to: vineconcept@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
And
Click here to apply online",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-02",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Executive Assistant / Administrator Job at Vine Concepts Enterprise




        
    

        
        Vine Concepts Enterprise is a professional consulting firm specializedin contract management and execution and human resources (HR) services. We partner with organizations to provide reliable, compliant, and people-focused solutions that support sustainable business growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position : Executive Assistant / Administrator

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion / Bag & Accessories Brand

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant / Administrator to support the Founder and oversee the daily administrative operations of a growing bag brand in Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for coordinating schedules, managing administrative processes, supporting business operations, and ensuring smooth communication across the business.
	This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced creative environment, possesses strong problem-solving skills, and can effectively manage multiple priorities with professionalism and discretion.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support:


	Manage the Founder’s calendar, appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements.
	Prepare reports, presentations, meeting minutes, and correspondence.
	Follow up on action points, deadlines, and ongoing business projects.
	Handle confidential information with a high level of professionalism and discretion.
	Serve as the primary point of contact between the executive office and internal/external stakeholders.


Administrative Duties:


	Coordinate daily office operations and administrative activities.
	Maintain organized records, filing systems, and business documentation.
	Manage office supplies, vendor relationships, and procurement processes.
	Handle incoming calls, emails, and inquiries professionally.
	Support the implementation of operational procedures and administrative systems.


Operations & Business Coordination:


	Assist with inventory tracking, order coordination, and customer fulfillment processes.
	Liaise with production teams, suppliers, logistics partners, and vendors.
	Support customer service activities to ensure excellent client experience.
	Assist with planning events, pop-ups, exhibitions, and brand activations.
	Coordinate internal communication and ensure efficient workflow across teams.


Financial & Reporting Support:


	Assist with expense tracking, invoices, and petty cash management.
	Prepare simple operational and administrative reports when required.
	Support budgeting and cost-monitoring activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Management, Mass Communication, or a related field.
	2–3 years of experience in an Executive Assistant, Administrative, or Operations role.
	Experience within the fashion, retail, lifestyle, or creative industry is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational, multitasking, and time-management skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, and digital collaboration tools.
	Ability to work independently and take initiative.
	High level of integrity, professionalism, and attention to detail.


Preferred Skills:


	Customer relationship management skills.
	Basic understanding of social media and digital business operations.
	Strong coordination and stakeholder management abilities.
	Ability to thrive under pressure and meet deadlines.


Core Competencies:


	Organization & Planning
	Communication Skills
	Problem Solving
	Confidentiality & Professionalism
	Attention to Detail
	Time Management
	Adaptability & Initiative.


Salary
N100,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resumes to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
And
Click here to apply online

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Production Dispatch and Inventory Officer",
  "description": "Redikla Resources Company is a professional recruitment and human resource outsourcing firm committed to connecting qualified talent with reputable organizations. We specialize in end-to-end recruitment, workforce placement, and HR support services, ensuring that clients receive reliable, competent, and well-screened personnel while helping job seekers secure suitable employment opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Dispatch and Inventory Officer

Job Location: Sango Ota, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities and Duties
Inventory Control &amp; Accuracy:


	?Maintain precise, up-to-date records of all stock movements (receipts, transfers, issues, and returns) using ERP software (e.g., SAP, Oracle) or Warehouse Management Systems (WMS).
	?Establish and manage Cycle Counting schedules and coordinate comprehensive periodic physical stock takes.
	?Investigate variances between physical stock and system records, conducting root-cause analysis to implement corrective actions.
	?Monitor stock levels to prevent stockouts of critical items while minimizing excess or obsolete inventory.
	?Define and maintain inventory parameters, including Minimum/Maximum stock levels, Reorder Points (ROP), and Safety Stock.


Warehouse &amp; Stores Management:


	?Optimize warehouse layout and space utilization using efficient storage methodologies (e.g., ABC analysis, FIFO/LIFO).
	?Ensure incoming materials are safely offloaded, inspected for quality/quantity against purchase orders, and correctly put away in designated bins.
	?Oversee the picking, packing, and dispatch of materials for internal production departments or external clients, ensuring high accuracy.
	?Maintain strict standards of housekeeping, organization, and safety (5S methodology) within the store&#39;s area.


Documentation &amp; System Administration:


	?Process all inventory transactions&mdash;such as Goods Receipt Notes (GRN), Material Requisition Notes (MRN), and delivery notes&mdash;accurately and promptly.
	?Generate regular inventory reports, including stock valuation, slow-moving/obsolete stock analyses, and key performance indicators (KPIs).
	?Ensure strict adherence to internal control procedures, financial audit guidelines, and supply chain compliance protocols.


Supplier &amp; Internal Stakeholder Liaison:


	?Coordinate closely with Procurement/Purchasing teams to expedite urgent deliveries and resolve discrepancies with suppliers regarding damages or shortages.
	?Partner with Production, Maintenance, and Operations departments to understand their material forecasts and ensure timely supply.


?Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	?Inventory Accuracy: ge 98% match between physical count and system records.
	?Stockout Frequency: Minimization of production downtime caused by unavailable material.
	?Inventory Turnover Ratio: Maximizing the efficiency of capital tied up in stock.
	?Order Fulfillment Cycle Time: Speed and accuracy of internal and external material dispatch.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: rediklaresources@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",

Production Dispatch and Inventory Officer Job at Redikla Resources Company




        
    

        
        Redikla Resources Company is a professional recruitment and human resource outsourcing firm committed to connecting qualified talent with reputable organizations. We specialize in end-to-end recruitment, workforce placement, and HR support services, ensuring that clients receive reliable, competent, and well-screened personnel while helping job seekers secure suitable employment opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Dispatch and Inventory Officer

Job Location: Sango Ota, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities and Duties
Inventory Control & Accuracy:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	?Maintain precise, up-to-date records of all stock movements (receipts, transfers, issues, and returns) using ERP software (e.g., SAP, Oracle) or Warehouse Management Systems (WMS).
	?Establish and manage Cycle Counting schedules and coordinate comprehensive periodic physical stock takes.
	?Investigate variances between physical stock and system records, conducting root-cause analysis to implement corrective actions.
	?Monitor stock levels to prevent stockouts of critical items while minimizing excess or obsolete inventory.
	?Define and maintain inventory parameters, including Minimum/Maximum stock levels, Reorder Points (ROP), and Safety Stock.


Warehouse & Stores Management:


	?Optimize warehouse layout and space utilization using efficient storage methodologies (e.g., ABC analysis, FIFO/LIFO).
	?Ensure incoming materials are safely offloaded, inspected for quality/quantity against purchase orders, and correctly put away in designated bins.
	?Oversee the picking, packing, and dispatch of materials for internal production departments or external clients, ensuring high accuracy.
	?Maintain strict standards of housekeeping, organization, and safety (5S methodology) within the store's area.


Documentation & System Administration:


	?Process all inventory transactions—such as Goods Receipt Notes (GRN), Material Requisition Notes (MRN), and delivery notes—accurately and promptly.
	?Generate regular inventory reports, including stock valuation, slow-moving/obsolete stock analyses, and key performance indicators (KPIs).
	?Ensure strict adherence to internal control procedures, financial audit guidelines, and supply chain compliance protocols.


Supplier & Internal Stakeholder Liaison:


	?Coordinate closely with Procurement/Purchasing teams to expedite urgent deliveries and resolve discrepancies with suppliers regarding damages or shortages.
	?Partner with Production, Maintenance, and Operations departments to understand their material forecasts and ensure timely supply.


?Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	?Inventory Accuracy: ge 98% match between physical count and system records.
	?Stockout Frequency: Minimization of production downtime caused by unavailable material.
	?Inventory Turnover Ratio: Maximizing the efficiency of capital tied up in stock.
	?Order Fulfillment Cycle Time: Speed and accuracy of internal and external material dispatch.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer (Lead Project Electrical Engineer)",
  "description": "Cheaper Beta Enterprises is fast growing company with focus to provide consumers goods and services at the best market price . We are continually creating an atmosphere for employees to grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer (Lead Project Electrical Engineer)

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos

Summary


	We are currently seeking a skilled and experienced Electrical Engineer to join our team as a Lead Project Electrical Engineer.
	The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in either the Construction or Oil &amp; Gas industry and must be capable of leading electrical engineering projects from planning to execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and supervise electrical engineering projects and site operations.
	Design, develop, and oversee electrical systems and installations.
	Ensure projects are completed within budget, timeline, and safety standards.
	Coordinate with contractors, technicians, and project stakeholders.
	Conduct inspections, testing, and troubleshooting of electrical systems.
	Prepare technical reports, project documentation, and progress updates.
	Ensure compliance with industry regulations and engineering standards.


Requirements

Electrical Engineer (Lead Project Electrical Engineer) Job at Cheaper Beta Enterprises




        
    

        
        Cheaper Beta Enterprises is fast growing company with focus to provide consumers goods and services at the best market price . We are continually creating an atmosphere for employees to grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer (Lead Project Electrical Engineer)

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are currently seeking a skilled and experienced Electrical Engineer to join our team as a Lead Project Electrical Engineer.
	The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in either the Construction or Oil & Gas industry and must be capable of leading electrical engineering projects from planning to execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and supervise electrical engineering projects and site operations.
	Design, develop, and oversee electrical systems and installations.
	Ensure projects are completed within budget, timeline, and safety standards.
	Coordinate with contractors, technicians, and project stakeholders.
	Conduct inspections, testing, and troubleshooting of electrical systems.
	Prepare technical reports, project documentation, and progress updates.
	Ensure compliance with industry regulations and engineering standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
	Proven experience as a Lead Project Electrical Engineer.
	Prior experience in either the Construction or Oil & Gas industry is required.
	Strong knowledge of electrical systems, project management, and safety procedures.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and work effectively under pressure.


Salary
N250,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
